design_philosophy.name: The Royal Ledger
design_philosophy.description: A high-end, brutalist-fintech workspace that feels like a digitized legal document. Precise, authoritative, and permanent. No softness, no ambiguity.
core_principles: Ink on Paper: High contrast Navy text on White backgrounds.
Value in Gold: Use Gold (#D5AD36) only for high-value actions or accents.
Data is Truth: Monospace fonts for all numbers, dates, and financial data.
Structure is Beauty: Visible borders, grids, and lines.

Button.default: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none border border-primary font-sans uppercase tracking-wider text-xs h-10 px-6
Button.secondary: bg-transparent text-primary border border-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-none font-sans uppercase tracking-wider text-xs h-10 px-6
Button.gold: bg-secondary text-primary hover:bg-secondary/90 border border-secondary font-bold

Card.wrapper: bg-white border border-primary/20 rounded-none p-6 relative overflow-hidden
Card.header: font-serif text-2xl text-primary mb-4 border-b border-primary/10 pb-2
Card.corner_mark: absolute top-0 right-0 w-4 h-4 border-t-2 border-r-2 border-secondary

Input.base: rounded-none border-primary/30 focus:border-secondary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-secondary bg-white font-mono text-sm h-10

Badge.base: rounded-none border border-primary text-primary bg-transparent font-mono text-[10px] uppercase px-2 py-0.5

Sidebar.container: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full bg-primary text-white border-r border-primary z-50
Sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-sans hover:bg-white/10 text-white/80 hover:text-white transition-colors border-l-2 border-transparent hover:border-secondary

Table.header: bg-muted/50 text-primary font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border-b-2 border-primary

visual_elements.border: Double-line border. Outer: 3pt Navy. Inner: 1pt Gold. Gap: 4pt. Corner Ornaments: Gold filled squares (8pt) at inner border corners.
visual_elements.seal: Gold (#D5AD36) 30-point star polygon (Programmatic). Text inside: 'OFFICIAL SEAL' (Helvetica-Bold, White).
visual_elements.watermark: Diagonal text 'TRUST CERTIFICATE' or Trust Name. Light Grey (#F0F0F0). Opacity 0.15.
visual_elements.layout: Landscape. Central alignment for Title and Trust Name. Two-column layout for details if needed, but preferably inline text 'This certifies that...'. Bottom section for 2 Signatures.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Add the custom colors (primary: #010079, secondary: #D5AD36) and fonts (Cormorant Garamond, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono) immediately.

2. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
3. SHARP CORNERS: Ensure 'rounded-none' is applied globally or via the radius variable in tailwind config (set --radius: 0rem).
4. BORDERS: Use visible 1px borders for separation instead of shadows. Use 'border-primary/20' for subtle dividers.
5. MONOSPACE DATA: Any number, date, currency, or ID MUST be in JetBrains Mono.
6. SIDEBAR: Implement the fixed sidebar with the specific Navy background (#010079).
7. TRUST SCORE: Display the Governance Health Score prominently using a large Serif font or a radial chart with Navy/Gold colors.
8. CORNER MARKS: Add decorative 'L' shapes (Gold color) to the corners of key dashboard cards using pseudo-elements to reinforce the 'technical/blueprint' aesthetic.
9. LOGIN PAGE: Use the provided marble texture as a subtle background with a Navy overlay (opacity 90%) or as a side panel.

10. PDF GENERATION (Backend): Update 'generate_certificate_pdf' in 'trust_units.py' to use ReportLab Canvas (not SimpleDocTemplate) for landscape orientation. Draw a Double Border (Navy/Gold), add a programmatic Gold Seal (star polygon), and format text as per 'pdf_certificate_design' specs.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) ONLY for overlays, not main cards.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles (Sharp rectangles in this case) with interaction animations.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
